description_long: This is a large, heavily armored tracked combat vehicle resembling a main battle tank, featuring a long, prominent cannon extending from a rotating turret. The hull is robust and angular, with thick armor plating covering the entire body, including the sides, front, and turret. The vehicle is equipped with continuous metal tracks for all-terrain mobility, and the suspension system is partially visible along the lower sides. A radio antenna is mounted on the turret, suggesting communication capabilities. The exterior is finished in a weathered, dark green camouflage pattern, with subtle wear and grime indicating operational use. No visible military insignia or unit markings are present on the hull or turret.
description: A large, armored tracked combat vehicle with a long cannon, rotating turret, and dark green camouflage. The exterior is rugged and heavily plated, with visible tracks and a mounted antenna.
description_view_0: Front view shows the thick frontal armor, the wide tracks, and the long barrel of the main cannon extending forward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the full length of the cannon, the angular turret, the side armor, and the continuous track system.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back armor, engine deck details, and the rear ends of the tracks.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the turret, cannon, and track system, with the antenna visible on the turret.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted on the turret; no other visible weapon mounts or hardpoints.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with thick, angular panels covering the hull and turret; sloped armor is visible on the front and sides.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Weathered dark green camouflage with subtle brown and black patches in an irregular, naturalistic pattern.
